span.p:
Vishnu
Chief Strategy Agent
Arms:4
Tools: Planning, Simulation, KPI Engine, Risk Model

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Lakshmi
Capital Allocation Agent
Arms:4
Tools: Forecasting, Allocation, Revenue Engine, Liquidity Monitor

span.p:
Shiva
Transformation Agent
Arms:3
Tools: Legacy Analyzer, Workflow Pruner, Restructure Model

Systems Architect

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Durga
Risk & Defense Agent
Arms:10
Tools: Threat AI, Regulatory Monitor, Incident Engine, Reputation Guard, Crisis Sim, Brand Defense, Integrity Monitor, Access Auditor, Ethics Checker, Stress Test

Tools: All APIs (Experimental Mode)
